title: taraxacum russeolum
intro: Taraxacum russeolum, also known as the Russian dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The Russian dandelion has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic properties, which may help to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum russeolum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to support liver and kidney health, as well as to promote overall well-being.
